creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Michael Bueker from comment #10)
(In reply to Martin Waschbüsch from comment #11)

Let's see the repo.

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/stable/11/share/man/man7/hier.7
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/stable/12/share/man/man7/hier.7
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/head/share/man/man7/hier.7

For -CURRENT and -STABLE, hier(7) has been updated in base r356918 and MFC'd to 11-STABLE and 12-STABLE in base r358107 and base r358106.

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/release/11.4.0/share/man/man7/hier.7
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/release/12.1.0/share/man/man7/hier.7

It will be in -RELEASE in new version.

As a result, I'll close this PR.
